sql.query: SELECT id,spaceId,configurationName,seatedCapacity,standingCapacity,maximumTotalCapacity,isDefault,isActive FROM tbl_space_configurations WHERE id=:id AND spaceId=:spaceId AND tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1
UPDATE tbl_space_configurations SET isDefault=0,defaultMarker=NULL WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND spaceId=:spaceId AND id<>:id AND :makeDefault=1

UPDATE tbl_space_configurations c INNER JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=c.spaceId AND s.tenantId=c.tenantId SET c.configurationName=:configurationName,c.description=NULLIF(:description,''),c.seatedCapacity=NULLIF(:seatedCapacity,''),c.standingCapacity=NULLIF(:standingCapacity,''),c.maximumTotalCapacity=NULLIF(:maximumTotalCapacity,''),c.isDefault=:isDefault,c.defaultMarker=CASE WHEN :isDefault2=1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END,c.isActive=:isActive,c.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE c.id=:id AND c.spaceId=:spaceId AND s.locationId=:locationId AND c.tenantId=:tenantId

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,beforeJson,afterJson,createdDate) VALUES (:tenantId,:userId,'configuration',:entityId,'configuration.updated',CONCAT(:actor,' updated configuration ',:configurationName),JSON_OBJECT('spaceId',:oldSpace,'configurationName',:oldName,'seatedCapacity',:oldSeated,'standingCapacity',:oldStanding,'maximumTotalCapacity',:oldMaximum,'isDefault',:oldDefault,'isActive',:oldActive),JSON_OBJECT('spaceId',:newSpace,'configurationName',:newName,'seatedCapacity',NULLIF(:newSeated,''),'standingCapacity',NULLIF(:newStanding,''),'maximumTotalCapacity',NULLIF(:newMaximum,''),'isDefault',:newDefault,'isActive',:newActive),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
